ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., shirt, pants, dress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the product (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the product is intended (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Value of the size (e.g., 3, 4, 5) */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length of the size in cm */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest circumference in cm */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist circumference in cm */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip circumference in cm */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the chart belongs to */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing standard the chart uses */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the chart (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the chart is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_sizing_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("sizing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Value of the size (e.g., 3, 4, 5) */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest circumference in cm */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist circumference in cm */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip circumference in cm */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the item is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Value of the size (e.g., 3, 4, 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was collected */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., sales, website traffic) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the analytics data is collected */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the analytics data is collected */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type for which the analytics data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Value of the size (e.g., 3, 4, 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
